title: Mission: Impossible The Final Reckoning REVIEW - A Disappointing End
description:
It pains me to say the Mission: Impossible franchise ends in disappointment. What a bummer.
That being said. Tom Cruise represents everything that Hollywood should be, but isn't.

I will be there opening day for his next film.

Edited by @QTRBlackGarrett
